name: Windrunner Spire
tagline: Windrunner family grief made manifest — firebirds, a duo wipe check, and a stormy finale.

bosses.name: Emberdawn
bosses.summary: Territorial firebird: drop Flaming Updraft in corners, dodge twisters during Burning Gale, and respect Searing Beak.

abilities.name: Flaming Updraft
abilities.note: Soak debuff near walls — eases twister dodging during Burning Gale.

abilities.name: Burning Gale / Fire Breath
abilities.note: Heavy movement phase — save defensives for breath overlap.

tips: Tank corners the boss for maximum safe floor.
Healer: CD for every Burning Gale.

bosses.name: Derelict Duo (Kalis & Latch)
bosses.summary: Twin-boss kill: use Latch's Heaving Yank to stop Debilitating Shriek; kill both together or Broken Bond enrages.

abilities.name: Broken Bond
abilities.note: Letting one boss die first enrages the other — balance DPS.

abilities.name: Splattering Spew
abilities.note: Places Gunk Splatter — defensives + healer CDs.

abilities.name: Curse of Darkness
abilities.note: Spawns Dark Entity — dispel, outrange, or CC.

tips: Interrupt Kalis Shadow Bolt; hook Shriek with Yank.
Tank: stack for cleave; mitigate Bone Hack.

bosses.name: Commander Kroluk
bosses.summary: Orcish war memories: bait Reckless Leap, stack for Intimidating Shout, and burn adds during Rallying Bellow.

abilities.name: Rallying Bellow
abilities.note: At 66% / 33% — huge damage, adds, boss takes less damage during Bladestorm.

abilities.name: Reckless Leap → Falling Rubble
abilities.note: Furthest player soaks leap; dodge puddles.

tips: Stack in Shout; don't scatter into fear.
Kill adds to end defensive phase.

bosses.name: The Restless Heart
bosses.summary: Wind and arrows: clear Squall Leap with Turbulent Arrows, surf Billowing Wind, and manage Bolt Gale.

abilities.name: Squall Leap
abilities.note: Grab Turbulent Arrows to clear stacks before lethal ramp.

abilities.name: Billowing Wind
abilities.note: Use arrows to jump waves — positioning puzzle.

tips: Pre-plan who takes priority arrows on high keys.
Healer tracks stack count for CD timing.

dangerousPacks.name: Spellguard Magus packs
handling: Knock mobs out of protection sphere; interrupt Spirit Bolt on Steward.

dangerousPacks.name: Devoted Woebringer
dangerousPacks.why: Pulsing Shriek absorb pulses the group until broken.
handling: Focus Woebringer; spare kicks on Shadow Bolt.
